qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_liquidacion as oi_liquidacion, t0.c_liquidacion as c_liquidacion, t0.d_titulo as d_titulo, t0.f_liquidacion as f_liquidacion, t0.c_clase as c_clase, t0.e_quincena as e_quincena, t0.f_cierre as f_cierre, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.l_ajuste as l_ajuste, t0.f_f649 as f_f649, SEC.policy, t0.c_liquidacion as CODE, t0.d_titulo as TEXT, t0.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, t0.oi_tipo_liq as oi_tipo_liq FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_liquidacion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_liquidacion as oi_liquidacion, SEC.policy FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_liquidacion asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.label: Fecha Valor para el pase Contable
attribute.name: f_valor

attribute.label: Fecha de Pago de la Liquidación

form-properties.label: Fecha de Pago de la Liquidación

attribute.description: Indica si la liquidacion va a ser utilizada para simulacion.

attribute.name: l_simulacion

attribute.label: Leyenda a imprimir en el recibo
attribute.name: t_leyenda

form-properties.label: Leyenda a imprimir en el recibo

attribute.label: Oi de liquidaicon que genero la actual
attribute.name: oi_liq_genera

attribute.label: Oi de liquidaicon de interface que genero la liquidaicon
attribute.name: oi_liq_genero

assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Generales Novedad
assosiation.label: Valores Variables Generales de Novedad
assosiation.name: VAL_VARGN

assosiation.description: Guarda todas las Ejecuciones de la Liquidacion
assosiation.label: Ejecuciones de Liquidaciones
assosiation.name: EJECUCIONES

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion as ID, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion as COD, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo as DES, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa as PARENT, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre, SEC.policy from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC join LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion) as CNT from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_param
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'noValidarCerradas\'')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_param_ig
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT e.d_valor FROM LIQ15_PARAM_EMP AS e, ORG26_PARAMETROS AS p JOIN e.oi_parametro INNER p.oi_parametro WHERE e.oi_empresa = {substring_before(#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT, \'_\')} AND p.c_parametro = \'LiqIGDevengado\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: LIQUIDACIONES
LIQUIDACIONES_ABIERTAS
LIQUIDACIONES_CERRADAS
sql_param
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'noValidarCerradas\'')/ROWS/ROW

method.description: Carga en la persona las varibles de novedad pasadas como parámetro,

method.name: CargarVariablesNovedades

method.description: Importa variables fijas y de novedad para una liquidación

method.label: Novedades por variables
method.name: NovPorVariables

method.label: EliminarLegajosNoLiquidados
method.name: EliminarLegajosNoLiquidados

method.label: Administrar Legajos
method.name: AdministrarLegajos

method.label: Inicializar
method.name: Inicializar

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@id} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo NOT IN (
SELECT LIQ99_RECIBOS.e_numero_legajo FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ99_RECIBOS WHERE LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion = LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ99_RECIBOS.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_estado = \'F\' AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {%=#SOURCE:@id%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT COUNT(LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq) AS cant FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq, recibos.f_cierre, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, recibos.oi_recibo, recibos.oi_liquidacion_ddo FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, ( select RC.f_cierre, PE.e_numero_legajo, RE.oi_recibo, LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo from LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJ, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LD, LIQ99_RECIBOS as RE, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as RC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE join EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo, RE.oi_liquidacion_ddo inner LD.oi_liquidacion_ddo, RE.oi_tot_liq_per inner RC.oi_tot_liq_per, PE.oi_per_emp_ddo inner RC.oi_per_emp_ddo where LD.c_estado=\'F\' and EJ.oi_liquidacion={%= #SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion %} ) as recibos JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo LEFT OUTER recibos.e_numero_legajo WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.e_numero_legajo, PER01.d_ape_y_nom, PER02.oi_obra_social, PER02.oi_sindicato, PER01.oi_afjp, PER02.oi_categoria_ult, LIQ07.oi_sucursal, PER31.l_banco, PER02.oi_forma_pago FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, LIQ07_PERSONAL AS LIQ07, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO AS PER31 JOIN PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal, PER02.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER LIQ07.oi_personal_emp, PER02.oi_forma_pago LEFT OUTER PER31.oi_forma_pago WHERE PER02.oi_personal_emp IN ({%=#SOURCE:@ids %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATOS> <ROWS nmd-col="1"> <ROW id="4366" /> </ROWS> <DATOS oi_empresa="1" e_periodo="201304" l_archivo="" gpers="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" listlegajos="" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" fecha_desde="" fecha_hasta="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_convenio="" soloconvenio="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion_desde="" oi_ubicacion_hasta="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_contrato="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" /> </DATOS>
resource.name: Form572

qry:select.name: qry_split
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('50;{%=$PARAM/ROWS/ROW/@id%}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LEGAJOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT {%? (#PARAMIN:@orden1!=''){% {%=#PARAMIN:@orden1 %} as orden1,%}{% %} %} {%? (#PARAMIN:@orden2!=''){% {%=#PARAMIN:@orden2 %} as orden2,%}{% %} %} l.oi_personal_emp, l.e_numero_legajo, p.d_ape_y_nom, p.c_nro_cuil, p.c_nro_documento, td.c_tipo_documento, u.c_ubicacion, u.d_ubicacion, loc.d_localidad, pro.d_provincia, dom.d_calle, dom.e_numero, dom.d_piso, dom.d_departamento, loc.c_postal, e.d_empresa, e.c_empresa, e.c_cuit, loc_emp.d_localidad as localidad_emp FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS as e, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as l, PER01_PERSONAL as p, PER20_TIPOS_DOC as td, ORG03_UBICACIONES as u, ORG19_LOCALIDADES AS loc, ORG35_PROVINCIAS AS pro, PER01_DOMIC_PER as dom, ORG19_LOCALIDADES as loc_emp JOIN e.oi_empresa INNER l.oi_empresa, l.oi_personal INNER p.oi_personal, p.oi_tipo_documento INNER td.oi_tipo_documento, l.oi_ubicacion LEFT OUTER u.oi_ubicacion, p.oi_personal LEFT OUTER dom.oi_personal, dom.oi_localidad LEFT OUTER loc.oi_localidad, loc.oi_provincia LEFT OUTER pro.oi_provincia, e.oi_localidad LEFT OUTER loc_emp.oi_localidad WHERE l.oi_empresa = {$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa} AND l.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@value%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_FAM_LEGAJO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT l.oi_personal_emp, f.d_ape_y_nom as nombre, tf.d_tipo_familiar as parentesco_desc, (td.c_tipo_documento || \' \' || f.c_nro_documento) as documento, GETPER(f.f_desde_IG) as pd, GETPER(f.f_hasta_IG) as ph FROM PER01_FLIARES_PER AS f, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS l, PER15_TIPOS_FAM AS tf, PER20_TIPOS_DOC AS td JOIN f.oi_personal inner l.oi_personal, f.oi_tipo_familiar inner tf.oi_tipo_familiar, f.oi_tipo_documento left outer td.oi_tipo_documento WHERE l.oi_empresa = {$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa} AND f.l_acargo_IG = 1 AND (ISNULL(f.f_hasta_IG) OR GETPER(f.f_hasta_IG) >= {$REP/@ene}) AND (ISNULL(f.f_desde_IG) OR GETPER(f.f_desde_IG) <= {$REP/@dic}) AND l.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@value%}) AND l.oi_personal_emp not in ( SELECT p.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS p, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF AS v, LIQ09_VARIABLES AS x JOIN p.oi_personal_emp inner v.oi_personal_emp, v.oi_variable inner x.oi_variable WHERE P.oi_empresa = {%=$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa%} AND x.c_variable = \'fp_famsiradig\' and v.n_valor = 1) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $REP/L join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_FAM_SIRADIG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT l.oi_personal_emp, d.d_denominacion as nombre, i.c_item_ig as parentesco_code, d.c_documento as documento, d.e_periodo_des as pd, d.e_periodo_has as ph FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS l, LIQ07_DEDUC_IG AS d, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF AS v, LIQ09_VARIABLES AS x, LIQ04_ITEMS_IG AS i JOIN l.oi_personal_emp inner d.oi_personal_emp, l.oi_personal_emp inner v.oi_personal_emp, v.oi_variable inner x.oi_variable, d.oi_item_ig inner i.oi_item_ig WHERE l.oi_empresa = {$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa} and x.c_variable = \'fp_famsiradig\' and v.n_valor = 1 and d.e_periodo_des <= {$REP/@dic} and d.e_periodo_has >= {$REP/@ene} and i.c_item_ig in (\'1\',\'2\',\'3\') AND l.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@value%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $REP/L join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_OTROS_EMP
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT l.oi_personal_emp, e.c_cuit, e.d_denominacion, sum(i.n_ganbruta) as n_ganbruta, sum(i.n_retribnohab)as n_retribnohab, sum(i.n_ajuste) as n_ajuste, sum(i.n_obrasocial) as n_obrasocial, sum(i.n_segsocial) as n_segsocial, sum(i.n_sindicato) as n_sindicato, sum(i.n_retganancias) as n_retganancias FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS l, LIQ07_OTROS_EMP AS e, LIQ07_ING_MENSUAL AS i JOIN l.oi_personal_emp inner e.oi_personal_emp, e.oi_otros_emp inner i.oi_otros_emp WHERE l.oi_empresa = {$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa} and i.e_periodo <= {$REP/@mes} and i.e_periodo >= {$REP/@ene} AND l.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@value%}) GROUP BY l.oi_personal_emp, e.c_cuit, e.d_denominacion ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $REP/L join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@id

qry:select.name: QRY_DEDUCCIONES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT l.oi_personal_emp, d.d_denominacion as den, d.d_descripcion as des, i.c_item_ig as i, i.d_item_ig as di, d.c_documento as doc, d.e_periodo_des as pd, d.e_periodo_has as ph, d.n_importe as m FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS l, LIQ07_DEDUC_IG AS d, LIQ04_ITEMS_IG AS i JOIN l.oi_personal_emp inner d.oi_personal_emp, d.oi_item_ig inner i.oi_item_ig WHERE l.oi_empresa = {$PARAMIN/@oi_empresa} and d.e_periodo_des <= {$REP/@mes} and d.e_periodo_has >= {$REP/@ene} and i.c_item_ig not in (\'1\',\'2\',\'3\') AND l.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@value%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $REP/L join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@id

method.label: Form572
method.name: Form572

resource.name: Form649Viejo
resource.declare:
<DATOS> <ROWS nmd-col="1"> <ROW id="1429"/> <ROW id="1326"/><ROW id="1430"/> <ROW id="10305"/><ROW id="2143"/> <ROW id="2144"/><ROW id="2145"/> <ROW id="10000"/><ROW id="10200"/> </ROWS> <DATOS oi_empresa="" salida="HTML" oi_liquidacion="" oi_variable="" report="" gpers="" gcustom="" oi_empresaFIL="8" oi_liquidacionFIL="2648" l_anioAnterior="1" l_archivo="" l_retencion="" orden1="" orden2="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" listlegajos="" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" fecha_desde="" fecha_hasta="" cb_confidenciales="" oi_grupo_ccosto="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_convenio="" soloconvenio="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion_desde="" oi_ubicacion_hasta="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_contrato="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" l_afiliado_sind="0" oi_departamento="" oi_sector=""/>
</DATOS>
resource.qry:select:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'PathForm649\' ')/ROWS/ROW
º

qry:select.name: qry_cabecera
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT O.c_empresa , O.d_empresa , O.c_cuit , E.d_dependencia_emp , E.d_encargado_F649 , E.d_puesto_enc_F649 , E.d_lugar_F649 , E.oi_firma_f649 , L.f_pago , getyear(L.f_pago) as anio , getmonth(L.f_pago) as mes , L.f_f649 , L.oi_liquidacion FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS AS O , LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ15_EMPRESAS AS E JOIN O.oi_empresa INNER L.oi_empresa , O.oi_empresa INNER E.oi_empresa WHERE O.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresaFIL} AND L.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacionFIL} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_split
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('50;{%=$PARAM/ROWS/ROW/@id%}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT {%? (#PARAM:@orden1!=''){% {%=#PARAM:@orden1 %} as orden1,%}{% %} %} {%? (#PARAM:@orden2!=''){% {%=#PARAM:@orden2 %} as orden2,%}{% %} %} P.oi_per_emp_ddo , P.d_ape_y_nom , P.c_nro_cuil , PS.d_dependencia_per , PS.o_F649 , PE.oi_personal_emp , T.oi_tot_liq_per , GetYear(L.f_pago) as anio , P.c_ubicacion , P.e_numero_legajo , U.d_ubicacion FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ99_RECIBOS AS R , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS T , LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER AS LIQ20_CON , LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC AS VAR , LIQ96_CONCEPTOS AS LIQ96 , LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP AS P , LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS PL , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PE , LIQ07_PERSONAL AS PS , ORG03_UBICACIONES(ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_empresa = {%=$PARAM/@oi_empresaFIL%}) AS U JOIN E.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L.oi_liquidacion_ddo , L.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER R.oi_liquidacion_ddo , R.oi_tot_liq_per INNER T.oi_tot_liq_per , T.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER P.oi_per_emp_ddo , E.oi_liquidacion INNER PL.oi_liquidacion , PL.oi_personal_emp INNER PE.oi_personal_emp , PL.oi_personal_emp INNER PS.oi_personal_emp , PE.e_numero_legajo INNER P.e_numero_legajo , T.oi_tot_liq_per INNER LIQ20_CON.oi_tot_liq_per , LIQ20_CON.oi_conc_liq_per INNER VAR.oi_conc_liq_per , LIQ20_CON.oi_concepto_ddo INNER LIQ96.oi_concepto_ddo , P.c_ubicacion LEFT OUTER U.c_ubicacion WHERE E.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacionFIL} AND
LIQ96.c_concepto = \'99999998\' {%? ($PARAM/@l_retencion=1) {% AND (VAR.n_valor_s != 0 or VAR.n_valor_e != 0) %} {%%} %} {%? (#PARAM:@l_anioAnterior!=1) {% AND VAR.c_variable = \'ap_igacumanio\' %} {% AND VAR.c_variable = \'ap_igacumanioant\' %} %}
AND L.c_estado = \'F\' AND PE.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#SOURCE:@value%})
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DOMICILIOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT D.d_calle , D.e_numero , D.d_piso , D.d_departamento , D.c_postal , D.oi_localidad FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PE , PER01_DOMIC_PER AS D JOIN PE.oi_personal INNER D.oi_personal WHERE PE.oi_personal_emp = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp %} AND D.l_domic_fiscal = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LOCALIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad , ORG35_PROVINCIAS.d_provincia FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES , ORG35_PROVINCIAS JOIN ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia INNER ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia WHERE ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad = {#SOURCE:@oi_localidad} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_OBRASOC
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_obra_social , PER06_OBRAS_SOC.d_obra_social , PER06_OBRAS_SOC.c_cuit FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP , PER06_OBRAS_SOC WHERE PER06_OBRAS_SOC.c_obra_social = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_obra_social AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo = {#SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ENTIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT max(LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig) AS c_item_ig , max(LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.d_item_ig) AS d_item_ig , max(LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_entidad_ig) AS d_entidad_ig , max(LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.c_nro_cuit) AS c_nro_cuit , max(LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_direccion) AS d_direccion FROM LIQ97_DEDUC_IG , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG , LIQ94_ITEMS_IG WHERE LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.c_entidad_ig = LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.c_entidad_ig AND LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.c_item_ig = LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig AND getyear(LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.f_fecha) = {#SOURCE:@e_anio} AND LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig = {#SOURCE:@c_item_ig} AND LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.oi_per_emp_ddo = {#SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo} GROUP BY LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig , LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.d_item_ig , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_entidad_ig , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.c_nro_cuit , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_direccion
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: d_cuotaMedico11b
qry:attribute.value: 'RG. 2437 Anexo III inc j) Honorarios asistencia Medica'

qry:attribute.name: d_otras15a
qry:attribute.value: 'RG. 2437 Anexo III inc. m) Personal Doméstico' + '-' + @entidadCuit

qry:attribute.name: d_otras15b
qry:attribute.value: 'RG. 2437 Anexo III inc. k) Interés Crédito Hipotecario ' + @entidadDesc

qry:select.name: QRY_BUSCAR_VAR
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC.c_variable , LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC.n_valor_s FROM LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC JOIN LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo INNER LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo , LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC.oi_conc_liq_per INNER LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_conc_liq_per WHERE LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per = {#SOURCE:@oi_tot_liq_per} AND LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto = \'99999998\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_BUSCAR_VAR_ANIO_ANT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC.c_variable , LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC.n_valor_s FROM LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS, LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC JOIN LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.oi_concepto_ddo INNER LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_concepto_ddo , LIQ20_VAR_LIQ_CONC.oi_conc_liq_per INNER LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_conc_liq_per WHERE LIQ20_CONC_LIQ_PER.oi_tot_liq_per = {#SOURCE:@oi_tot_liq_per} AND LIQ96_CONCEPTOS.c_concepto = \'99999998\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: n_tot2
qry:attribute.value: number(@n_tot2a) + number(@n_tot2b) + number(@n_tot2c) + number(@n_tot2d) + number(@n_tot2e) + number(@n_tot2f) + number(@n_tot2g)

method.label: Form649
method.name: Form649

method.label: LiqIG
method.name: LiqIG

method.label: LiqIGDesde2017
method.name: LiqIGDesde2017

method.label: GuardarLiquidacion
method.name: GuardarLiquidacion

method.label: LiqIGDesde2018
method.name: LiqIGDesde2018

method.label: LiqIGByReport
method.name: LiqIGByReport

resource.declare: <DATOS><ROWS nmd-col="1"><ROW id="2" /><ROW id="4" /><ROW id="5" /><ROW id="6" /><ROW id="1249" /><ROW id="7" /><ROW id="8" /><ROW id="9" /><ROW id="10" /><ROW id="11" /><ROW id="13" /><ROW id="14" /><ROW id="16" /><ROW id="17" /><ROW id="18" /><ROW id="19" /><ROW id="20" /><ROW id="5522" /></ROWS><DATOS oi_empresa="" salida="HTML" oi_liquidacion="" oi_variable="" report="" gpers="" gcustom="" oi_empresaFIL="1" oi_liquidacionFIL="101" f_fecha="" l_anioAnterior="" l_archivo="" l_retencion="" orden1="" orden2="" activos="1" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" listlegajos="1-200" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" fecha_desde="" fecha_hasta="" cb_confidenciales="" oi_grupo_ccosto="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_convenio="" soloconvenio="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion_desde="" oi_ubicacion_hasta="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_contrato="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" l_afiliado_sind="0" oi_departamento="" oi_sector="" /></DATOS>
resource.name: QRY_IG

qry:select.name: LIQUIDACIONES

method.label: Actualizar el oi_liq_genera de la liquidacion
method.name: ActualizarLiquidacion

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion as ID, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion as COD, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo as DES, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa as PARENT, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.f_cierre, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_estado, SEC.policy from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION\') as SEC join LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion LEFT OUTER SEC.id Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} order by c_estado asc, f_cierre asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Liquidacion.LIQUIDACION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion) as CNT from LIQ19_LIQUIDACION Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare:
<DATOS> <ROWS nmd-col="1"> <ROW id="1429"/> <ROW id="1326"/><ROW id="1430"/> <ROW id="10305"/><ROW id="2143"/> <ROW id="2144"/><ROW id="2145"/> <ROW id="10000"/><ROW id="10200"/> </ROWS> <DATOS oi_empresa="" salida="HTML" oi_liquidacion="" oi_variable="" report="" gpers="" gcustom="" oi_empresaFIL="8" oi_liquidacionFIL="2648" l_anioAnterior="1" l_archivo="" l_retencion="" orden1="" orden2="" activos="" nombre="" documento="" sexo="" grupo_sanguineo="" listlegajos="" oi_indic_activo="" egresado="" oi_forma_pago="" oi_tipo_personal="" fecha_desde="" fecha_hasta="" cb_confidenciales="" oi_grupo_ccosto="" oi_centro_costo="" oi_convenio="" soloconvenio="" oi_categoria="" oi_ubicacion_desde="" oi_ubicacion_hasta="" oi_estructura="" escructura_childs="" oi_contrato="" oi_afjp="" oi_obra_social="" oi_sindicato="" l_afiliado_sind="0" oi_departamento="" oi_sector=""/>
</DATOS>
resource.name: Form649

qry:select.name: qry_path
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'PathForm649\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_cabecera
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT O.c_empresa , O.d_empresa , O.c_cuit , E.d_dependencia_emp , E.d_encargado_F649 , E.d_puesto_enc_F649 , E.d_lugar_F649 , E.oi_firma_f649 , L.f_pago , getyear(L.f_pago) as anio , getmonth(L.f_pago) as mes , L.f_f649 , L.oi_liquidacion FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS AS O , LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ15_EMPRESAS AS E JOIN O.oi_empresa INNER L.oi_empresa , O.oi_empresa INNER E.oi_empresa WHERE O.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresaFIL} AND L.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacionFIL} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_split
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('50;{%=$PARAM/ROWS/ROW/@id%}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT {%? (#PARAM:@orden1!=''){% {%=#PARAM:@orden1 %} as orden1,%}{% %} %} {%? (#PARAM:@orden2!=''){% {%=#PARAM:@orden2 %} as orden2,%}{% %} %} P.oi_per_emp_ddo , P.d_ape_y_nom , P.c_nro_cuil , PS.d_dependencia_per , PS.o_F649 , PE.oi_personal_emp , T.oi_tot_liq_per , GetYear(L.f_pago) as anio , P.c_ubicacion , P.e_numero_legajo , U.d_ubicacion FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES AS E , LIQ99_LIQUIDACION AS L , LIQ99_RECIBOS AS R , LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER AS T
, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP AS P , LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS PL , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PE , LIQ07_PERSONAL AS PS , ORG03_UBICACIONES(ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_empresa = {%=$PARAM/@oi_empresaFIL%}) AS U JOIN E.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER L.oi_liquidacion_ddo , L.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER R.oi_liquidacion_ddo , R.oi_tot_liq_per INNER T.oi_tot_liq_per , T.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER P.oi_per_emp_ddo , E.oi_liquidacion INNER PL.oi_liquidacion , PL.oi_personal_emp INNER PE.oi_personal_emp , PL.oi_personal_emp INNER PS.oi_personal_emp , PE.e_numero_legajo INNER P.e_numero_legajo
, P.c_ubicacion LEFT OUTER U.c_ubicacion WHERE E.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacionFIL} {%? (#PARAM:@l_anioAnterior!=1 ) {% {%? ($PARAM/@l_retencion=1 and #GRUPO:ROW[@c_variable='ap_igacumanio']/@c_columna != '' ) {% AND VAR.{%= #GRUPO:ROW[@c_variable='ap_igacumanio']/@c_columna %} != 0 %} {%%} %} %} {% {%? ($PARAM/@l_retencion=1 and #GRUPOANT:ROW[@c_variable='ap_igacumanioant']/@c_columna != '') {% AND VAR.{%= #GRUPOANT:ROW[@c_variable='ap_igacumanioant']/@c_columna %} != 0 %} {%%} %} %} %}
AND L.c_estado = \'F\' AND PE.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#SOURCE:@value%})
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DOMICILIOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT D.d_calle , D.e_numero , D.d_piso , D.d_departamento , D.c_postal , D.oi_localidad FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PE , PER01_DOMIC_PER AS D JOIN PE.oi_personal INNER D.oi_personal WHERE PE.oi_personal_emp = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp %} AND D.l_domic_fiscal = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LOCALIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad , ORG35_PROVINCIAS.d_provincia FROM ORG19_LOCALIDADES , ORG35_PROVINCIAS JOIN ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia INNER ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia WHERE ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad = {#SOURCE:@oi_localidad} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_OBRASOC
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_obra_social , PER06_OBRAS_SOC.d_obra_social , PER06_OBRAS_SOC.c_cuit FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP , PER06_OBRAS_SOC WHERE PER06_OBRAS_SOC.c_obra_social = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.c_obra_social AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo = {#SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ENTIDADES
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT max(LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig) AS c_item_ig , max(LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.d_item_ig) AS d_item_ig , max(LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_entidad_ig) AS d_entidad_ig , max(LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.c_nro_cuit) AS c_nro_cuit , max(LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_direccion) AS d_direccion FROM LIQ97_DEDUC_IG , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG , LIQ94_ITEMS_IG WHERE LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.c_entidad_ig = LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.c_entidad_ig AND LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.c_item_ig = LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig AND getyear(LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.f_fecha) = {#SOURCE:@e_anio} AND LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig = {#SOURCE:@c_item_ig} AND LIQ97_DEDUC_IG.oi_per_emp_ddo = {#SOURCE:@oi_per_emp_ddo} GROUP BY LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.c_item_ig , LIQ94_ITEMS_IG.d_item_ig , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_entidad_ig , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.c_nro_cuit , LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG.d_direccion
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: d_cuotaMedico11b
qry:attribute.value: 'RG. 2437 Anexo III inc j) Honorarios asistencia Medica'

qry:attribute.name: d_otras15a
qry:attribute.value: 'RG. 2437 Anexo III inc. m) Personal Doméstico' + '-' + @entidadCuit

qry:attribute.name: d_otras15b
qry:attribute.value: 'RG. 2437 Anexo III inc. k) Interés Crédito Hipotecario ' + @entidadDesc

qry:select.name: QRY_BUSCAR_VAR
QRY_BUSCAR_VAR_ANIO_ANT

qry:attribute.name: n_tot2
qry:attribute.value: number(@n_tot2a) + number(@n_tot2b) + number(@n_tot2c) + number(@n_tot2d) + number(@n_tot2e) + number(@n_tot2f) + number(@n_tot2g)

qry:select.name: qry_def_variables_grupos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.c_columna, LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo FROM LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR, LIQ31_GRUPOS, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_grupo, LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_variable WHERE LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo = \'1\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_def_variables_grupos_ant
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.c_columna, LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo FROM LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR, LIQ31_GRUPOS, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN LIQ31_GRUPOS.oi_grupo INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_grupo, LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable INNER LIQ31_GRUPO_VAR.oi_variable WHERE LIQ31_GRUPOS.c_grupo = \'2\'
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq as value FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@oi_liq_genero} ')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Valores de los variables de Generales Novedad
class.label: Valor Variable General Novedad
class.name: VAL_VARGN

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

class.help: Guarda todas las Ejecuciones de la Liquidacion
class.label: Ejecuciones
class.name: EJECUCION

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:
